name: Cccs Of Sheboygan
description_short: NFCC-approved non-profit credit counseling agency serving Wisconsin and Minnesota with certified financial counselors offering free initial consultations and debt management strategies.
description_long:
CCCS of Sheboygan is a non-profit credit counseling organization approved by the National Foundation for Credit Counseling (NFCC) and operates across Wisconsin and Minnesota, serving communities in Sheboygan, LaCrosse, West Bend, and Fond du Lac. The organization positions itself as a financial advocate dedicated to guiding consumers toward financial wellness and stability.

The agency offers comprehensive financial counseling services including one-on-one certified counselor sessions, financial skills education courses through partner organizations, housing decision counseling, and homeowner education options. Their flagship offering is a free one-hour initial consultation that includes financial assessment, credit score review, goal planning, and personalized action plan development. They also provide ongoing support to clients after initial counseling and advertise that the majority of their clients increase savings and decrease debt by 10% within six months.

CCCS distinguishes itself through NFCC accreditation, which signals adherence to national standards for non-profit credit counseling. Their website emphasizes real-world experience, tailored solutions, and a non-judgmental approach to financial education. Client testimonials highlight the educational value and accessibility of their services, with clients noting appreciation for learning financial skills without shame or condescension.

As a free-help category non-profit, CCCS operates with the mission of helping underserved populations access financial guidance. However, the website provides limited specific information about debt management plan details, fee structures for ongoing services beyond the free consultation, credential specifics of counselors, or success metrics beyond the stated 10% improvement claim. The organization's service areas appear geographically limited to specific Wisconsin and Minnesota regions.
pros: NFCC-approved organization meeting national standards for non-profit credit counseling
Free one-hour initial consultation with comprehensive financial assessment and credit review
Certified counselors available for one-on-one money management and debt strategy sessions
Educational courses on financial skills offered in partnership with community organizations
Specialized housing counseling and homeowner education options for mortgage/housing questions
Documented client success with reported 10% average debt reduction and savings increase within six months
Multi-service approach addressing credit scores, debt repayment, budgeting, and financial goal-setting
cons: Limited geographic service area restricted to specific Wisconsin and Minnesota regions only
Website lacks transparency about fees or costs for ongoing counseling beyond the free initial consultation
No specific details about debt management plan structure, duration, or creditor negotiations
Minimal information provided about individual counselor credentials, experience, or specializations
Success metrics based on aggregate client claims rather than independently verified outcomes
best_for: Wisconsin and Minnesota residents struggling with debt, budgeting, or credit score issues seeking free initial guidance
First-time homebuyers or homeowners needing housing-specific financial counseling and education
Individuals seeking non-judgmental financial education and confidence-building in money management
Consumers wanting ongoing support from a certified counselor to develop personalized financial strategies
diagnosis: CCCS of Sheboygan is best for Wisconsin and Minnesota residents seeking free, non-profit credit counseling from NFCC-certified counselors to develop debt reduction and money management strategies. The main caveat is that services are geographically limited to specific regions, and the website lacks detailed transparency about ongoing service costs and specific debt management outcomes beyond general client testimonials.
services: Credit report review and credit score improvement counseling
One-on-one debt management and money management counseling
Personalized financial goal planning and action plan development
Ongoing counselor support after initial consultation
Budget creation and money management training
Student loan debt assistance and strategy
Credit history education and score building strategies
typical_results_timeline: Counseling available within 1-2 weeks of contact.
address: 17 Forest Avenue, Suite 016, , Fond Du Lac, WI 54935
